provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human female Compact ship captain in her 50s wearing a navy bridge coat with tarnished gold shoulder boards over steel-blue uniform, document case, polished scuffed boots, the coat shows decades of corridors and command, institutional authority at its peak

judgment.explanation: Cross-faction comparison subject. Faction-appropriate costume for the specified role, useful for teaching same-role-different-faction visual discrimination.
